evals.prompt: Add a fade-in and slide-up entrance animation to a card component using motion.
evals.expected_output: Motion component from motion/vue with initial and animate props
expectations: Uses :initial prop with opacity: 0 and y offset
Uses :animate prop with opacity: 1 and y: 0
Includes :transition prop with duration or spring config

evals.prompt: Create a spring animation for a button that bounces when it appears.
evals.expected_output: Motion component with spring transition configuration
expectations: Includes spring parameters (stiffness, damping, or bounce)
Shows initial and animate states for the bounce effect

evals.prompt: Implement enter and exit animations for a modal overlay using motion.
evals.expected_output: AnimatePresence wrapping Motion with v-if, initial/animate/exit props
expectations: Wraps conditional Motion component with v-if inside AnimatePresence
Defines :exit prop for the leave animation
Shows both :initial and :animate props for enter animation
